ideation: This sequence mimics the action of enjoying shaved ice, starting with a relaxed posture and moving to a scooping motion. The left arm remains relatively static to maintain balance, while the right arm performs the dynamic action. The sequence will progress from a neutral pose, to a hand-to-mouth motion, and then back to a relaxed pose.  The wrists will be used to enhance the natural look of the hand movements. In the first frame, both arms are relaxed at the sides. The second frame shows the right arm lifting to scoop the shaved ice. In the third frame, the right arm brings the imaginary shaved ice to the mouth. Finally, in the fourth frame, the right arm returns to a relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready for a treat
the right arm lifts and scoops the icy sweetness
bringing the cool treat up to the mouth to taste
both arms relax, the treat is enjoyed
